topics.label: Historical Context
topics.description: Simula introduced classes, objects, inheritance, and virtual methods. OOP starts here.

topics.label: Classes & Objects
topics.description: CLASS keyword with BEGIN/END blocks. Virtual procedures for polymorphism.

topics.label: Coroutines
topics.description: DETACH and RESUME for cooperative multitasking. Simula pioneered coroutines.

topics.label: Simulation Capabilities
topics.description: Built-in simulation framework for discrete event simulation. The language's namesake purpose.
